full_text:
Li Quan (Boyu) 李權 (伯豫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Quan (李權), styledBoyu (伯豫), was born in Guanghan. Influential man in Shu, executed by Liu Yan on a flimsy excuse. Li Quan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Li Quan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
